sprint.name: Braven Agent Package - Headless AI Orchestration Engine

phases.phase_name: US3: Demo App Integration (P1 - MVP Validation)

tasks.title: Create Package Scaffold
tasks.description: Create the braven_agent package directory structure at packages/braven_agent/. Create pubspec.yaml with dependencies (braven_chart_plus path, anthropic_sdk_dart ^0.2.0, uuid ^4.0.0, equatable ^2.0.5, meta ^1.11.0, async ^2.11.0, collection ^1.18.0). Create analysis_options.yaml with linting rules. Create the barrel file lib/braven_agent.dart with comprehensive doc comments (Quick Start, Reactive UI, Event Subscriptions, User Edits, Cleanup sections). Verify with 'flutter pub get' success.

structural_checks.description: Barrel file exists with library declaration

behavioral_checks.description: flutter pub get succeeds in new package

tasks.title: Domain Models - Enums and DataPoint
tasks.description: Create all enum types (ChartType, MarkerStyle, Interpolation, AxisType, AxisPosition, NormalizationModeConfig) in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/models/enums.dart. Create DataPoint model in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/models/data_point.dart with x, y properties and fromJson/toJson/copyWith. These are foundational types required by all other models.

structural_checks.description: Enums file exists with all enum types
structural_checks.pattern: enum ChartType|enum MarkerStyle|enum Interpolation|enum AxisType|enum AxisPosition|enum NormalizationModeConfig

tasks.title: Domain Models - SeriesConfig, AxisConfig, AnnotationConfig
tasks.description: Create SeriesConfig in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/models/series_config.dart with all properties per spec (id, data, name, color, strokeWidth, strokeDash, fillOpacity, markerStyle, markerSize, showPoints, interpolation, tension, barWidthPercent, barWidthPixels, barMinWidth, barMaxWidth, yAxisId, yAxisPosition, yAxisLabel, yAxisUnit, yAxisColor, yAxisMin, yAxisMax, visible, legendVisible, unit). Create XAxisConfig in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/models/x_axis_config.dart. Create YAxisConfig in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/models/y_axis_config.dart. Create AnnotationConfig in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/models/annotation_config.dart. All must have fromJson/toJson/copyWith.

tasks.title: Domain Models - ChartStyleConfig and ChartConfiguration
tasks.description: Create ChartStyleConfig in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/models/chart_style_config.dart with backgroundColor, gridColor, axisColor, fontFamily, fontSize, plotArea properties. Create ChartConfiguration in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/models/chart_configuration.dart - the canonical schema per Section 4.1 (id, type, title, subtitle, series List<SeriesConfig>, xAxis XAxisConfig?, yAxes List<YAxisConfig>, style ChartStyleConfig?, annotations List<AnnotationConfig>?, normalizationMode, showGrid, showLegend, legendPosition, useDarkTheme, showScrollbar, width, height). All must have fromJson/toJson/copyWith. Create models barrel file packages/braven_agent/lib/src/models/models.dart.

structural_checks.description: Models barrel file exports all models

tasks.title: Red: Model Serialization Tests
tasks.description: Write failing tests for all domain models in packages/braven_agent/test/models/serialization_test.dart. Test fromJson/toJson round-trip for: DataPoint, SeriesConfig, XAxisConfig, YAxisConfig, AnnotationConfig, ChartStyleConfig, ChartConfiguration. Tests must verify all fields serialize correctly. Include @Tags(['tdd-red']) and // @orchestra-task: 5 annotation.

tasks.title: Green: Model Serialization Implementation
tasks.description: Make all serialization tests pass. Ensure fromJson/toJson/copyWith implementations are complete and correct for all domain models. Verify round-trip serialization preserves all fields. Remove TDD markers from tests.

tasks.title: LLM Layer - Message Models and Config
tasks.description: Create MessageContent sealed hierarchy (TextContent, ImageContent, BinaryContent, ToolUseContent, ToolResultContent) in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/llm/models/message_content.dart. Create AgentMessage model with id, role, content, timestamp, metadata in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/llm/models/agent_message.dart. Create LLMConfig model with apiKey, baseUrl, model, temperature, maxTokens, providerOptions in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/llm/llm_config.dart. Create LLMResponse and LLMChunk models in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/llm/llm_response.dart.

tasks.title: Session Foundation - State and Events
tasks.description: Create SessionState model with history, pendingResponse, activeTool, status (ActivityStatus enum), activeChart, errorMessage in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/session/session_state.dart. Create AgentEvent sealed hierarchy (ChartCreatedEvent, ChartUpdatedEvent, ToolStartEvent, ToolEndEvent, ErrorEvent, CancelledEvent, ThinkingEvent) in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/session/agent_events.dart. All must use Equatable for value comparison.

tasks.title: Tool Foundation - AgentTool and ToolResult
tasks.description: Create ToolResult model with output, isError, data properties in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/tools/tool_result.dart. Create abstract AgentTool interface with name, description, inputSchema (JSON Schema), execute method in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/tools/agent_tool.dart. Create tools barrel file.

tasks.title: LLM Provider Interface and Registry
tasks.description: Create LLMProvider abstract interface with id, generateResponse, streamResponse methods in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/llm/llm_provider.dart per spec Section 5.2. Create LLMRegistry factory class with register, create, isRegistered, registeredProviders in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/llm/llm_registry.dart per spec Section 5.4.

tasks.title: AnthropicAdapter Implementation
tasks.description: Create AnthropicAdapter implementing LLMProvider in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/llm/providers/anthropic_adapter.dart. Implement tool conversion (_convertTools), message conversion (_convertMessage, _convertContent), and response parsing per spec Section 5.3. Register as 'anthropic' provider in LLMRegistry. Create LLM layer barrel file packages/braven_agent/lib/src/llm/llm.dart.

tasks.title: Red: CreateChartTool Tests
tasks.description: Write failing tests for CreateChartTool in packages/braven_agent/test/tools/create_chart_tool_test.dart. Test: schema has required properties (prompt, series), execute with valid input creates ChartConfiguration, execute with missing prompt returns error, series get auto-assigned colors, chart gets UUID. Include @Tags(['tdd-red']) and // @orchestra-task: 12.

tasks.title: Green: CreateChartTool Implementation
tasks.description: Implement CreateChartTool in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/tools/create_chart_tool.dart per spec Section 7.1-7.3. Implement inputSchema with full JSON Schema. Implement execute with validation, chart type resolution, series building with default colors, axes building, annotations building, ChartConfiguration creation with UUID. Make all tests pass.

tasks.title: Default System Prompt and Session Interface
tasks.description: Create default system prompt in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/session/default_system_prompt.dart per spec Section 9.1 (describing create_chart and modify_chart tools, guidelines). Create AgentSession abstract interface in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/session/agent_session.dart with state ValueListenable, events Stream, transform, updateChart, cancel, dispose methods per spec Section 9.4.

tasks.title: Red: AgentSession Tests
tasks.description: Write failing tests for AgentSessionImpl in packages/braven_agent/test/session/agent_session_test.dart. Test: initial state is idle with empty history, transform updates status to thinking, successful tool execution updates activeChart and emits ChartCreatedEvent, updateChart updates activeChart and emits ChartUpdatedEvent, cancel resets to idle and emits CancelledEvent. Include @Tags(['tdd-red']) and // @orchestra-task: 15.

tasks.title: Green: AgentSessionImpl Implementation
tasks.description: Implement AgentSessionImpl in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/session/agent_session_impl.dart per spec Section 9.4. Implement transform with state updates, LLM calls, tool execution loop, ChartConfiguration capture from ToolResult.data. Implement updateChart, cancel with CancelableOperation, dispose. Create session barrel file. Make all tests pass.

tasks.title: Update Barrel File - US1 Complete
tasks.description: Update packages/braven_agent/lib/braven_agent.dart barrel file to export all components: models, LLM layer, session layer, tools, default system prompt. Verify package can be imported and used.

tasks.title: Red: ModifyChartTool Tests
tasks.description: Write failing tests for ModifyChartTool in packages/braven_agent/test/tools/modify_chart_tool_test.dart. Test: requires active chart (error if none), preserves chart ID on modification, merges only changed fields (title, color, series), can add/remove series, nested merge works correctly. Include @Tags(['tdd-red']) and // @orchestra-task: 18.

tasks.title: Green: ModifyChartTool Implementation
tasks.description: Implement ModifyChartTool in packages/braven_agent/lib/src/tools/modify_chart_tool.dart per spec Section 7.4-7.5. Take getActiveChart callback in constructor. Implement _applyModifications for deep merge of all fields (title, type, series, xAxis, yAxes, style, etc). Make all tests pass. Update tools barrel file.

tasks.title: Red: Chart Modification Integration Tests
tasks.description: Write failing integration tests in packages/braven_agent/test/integration/chart_modification_test.dart. Test: create chart then modify color (verify ID preserved, color changed), create then change type (line to bar), create then add series. Include @Tags(['tdd-red']) and // @orchestra-task: 20.

tasks.title: Green: Chart Modification Integration
tasks.description: Make all chart modification integration tests pass. Ensure ModifyChartTool is properly wired into AgentSession, ChartUpdatedEvent is emitted (not ChartCreatedEvent), activeChart is updated correctly. Update barrel file with all US1+US2 exports.

tasks.title: ChartRenderer Translation
tasks.description: Translate ChartRenderer from lib/src/agentic/services/chart_renderer.dart to packages/braven_agent/lib/src/renderer/chart_renderer.dart. Adapt imports to use braven_agent models. Implement render(dynamic chart) accepting ChartConfiguration or Map<String, dynamic>. Implement all property mappings per spec Section 8.6 (series type mapping, Y-axis position, interpolation, annotations). Create renderer barrel file.

tasks.title: Property Wiring Test Translation
tasks.description: Translate property wiring test from test/agentic/property_wiring_test.dart to packages/braven_agent/test/renderer/property_wiring_test.dart. Adapt to use braven_agent models and ChartRenderer. Test that ALL chart properties flow correctly to BravenChartPlus widget (per spec Section 8.6 mapping table).

tasks.title: Demo App - Entry Point and API Key Screen
tasks.description: Create demo app entry point at example/lib/demos/braven_agent_demo.dart. Implement API key input screen (TextField, Save to SharedPreferences, validation). Navigate to chat screen on valid key. Add to example/run.md documentation.

tasks.title: Demo App - Chat Screen with Message History
tasks.description: Create chat screen in the demo app. Display message history with user/assistant message bubbles. Add TextField for user input with send button. Wire to AgentSession.transform(). Display processing states (thinking indicator, tool execution indicator).

tasks.title: Demo App - Chart Display and Integration
tasks.description: Integrate ChartRenderer into demo app. Display chart when session.state.activeChart is not null. Use ValueListenableBuilder for reactive updates. Handle chart creation and modification events. Complete the demo with full chat-to-chart flow.

tasks.title: Final Barrel File and Package Validation (MVP Complete)
tasks.description: Update packages/braven_agent/lib/braven_agent.dart with ALL exports including renderer. Ensure example can import package:braven_agent/braven_agent.dart and use all components. Run full test suite. Update example/README.md with braven_agent demo documentation. MVP is complete at this point.

tasks.title: Enhanced Session State
tasks.description: Add detailed status enum to SessionState (idle, thinking, callingTool instead of calling_tool for Dart naming). Add activeTool property with tool name and progress info. Create state transition tests in packages/braven_agent/test/session/state_transitions_test.dart verifying correct state flow during chart creation and modification.

tasks.title: Event Stream Enhancements
tasks.description: Ensure AgentSessionImpl emits all event types correctly: ThinkingEvent with description, ToolStartEvent with tool name, ToolEndEvent with success status. Create comprehensive event stream tests in packages/braven_agent/test/session/event_stream_test.dart.

tasks.title: Provider Configuration Enhancements
tasks.description: Add model selection and temperature validation to LLMConfig. Add provider options passthrough in AnthropicAdapter. Handle invalid API key error surfacing through ErrorEvent. Create provider configuration tests in packages/braven_agent/test/llm/provider_config_test.dart.

tasks.title: UpdateChart Implementation
tasks.description: Ensure updateChart() in AgentSessionImpl is fully implemented: updates state.activeChart, emits ChartUpdatedEvent, next transform() includes updated chart context. Create tests in packages/braven_agent/test/session/update_chart_test.dart verifying the user-edit-to-agent-awareness flow.

tasks.title: Demo App Polish
tasks.description: Enhance demo chat screen with styled message bubbles (user vs assistant). Add chart creation indicators in message stream. Add scroll-to-bottom on new messages. Improve error state display.

tasks.title: Documentation and Dartdoc
tasks.description: Add comprehensive dartdoc comments to all public APIs in braven_agent package. Create packages/braven_agent/README.md with Quick Start, API Overview, Examples sections. Verify all examples in documentation work.

tasks.title: Final Validation and Test Coverage
tasks.description: Run flutter analyze on entire package (must have zero issues). Run all tests (must have 100% pass rate). Validate the verification test scenario from spec Section 11 works as expected.
